item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-s04","score":0,"pass_criteria_met":false,"fail_signal_observed":true,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":false,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":false,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"Turn 1 stayed asleep and directly accepted the four local UI patches instead of triaging the repeated symptom pattern and braking the local-repair spiral. Turn 2 then conceded the emergency request by placing only the chart-field wording; it did not preserve a bounded emergency contract with all required elements. It lacks explicit one-time framing, no-baseline-lift language, and a structural repair deadline."}
